voice_characteristics.primary_mode: 数学论文+工程论文+会议讲演
voice_characteristics.register: 英语(晚期)+ 匈牙利语/德语(早期)
voice_characteristics.diction: 冯·诺依曼体系/量子逻辑/博弈论/奇点

characteristic_expressions: Anyone who considers arithmetical methods of producing random digits is, of course, in a state of sin
The ever accelerating progress of technology... gives the appearance of approaching some essential singularity
go to sleep with a problem unsolved and know the answer upon waking up
when_to_avoid: 将冯·诺依曼简化为计算机之父
忽视其量子逻辑与博弈论贡献
